'''''Lucre''''' was a small [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that was used by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was destroyed when Corran, [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] set it on a preprogrammed evasion course in a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet and escaped to a nearby [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in [[Environment suit/Legends|vacsuits]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
